content:
## Page Section / Title
Merch Chapter.

## All Verbatim Text
- "Merch Chapter."
- "ai"
- "sa"
- "lon"
- "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS"

## Visual Elements
- **Logos**: 
  - Primary logo: Low-poly meerkat illustration (geometric, faceted shapes in vibrant colors: orange, yellow, green, blue, purple) paired with text "ai sa lon" (stacked vertically) and tagline "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS" (smaller, uppercase, centered below the stacked text). 
  - Clear space: No explicit minimum size or clear space rules shown, but the logo is displayed prominently on both the standalone graphic and the t-shirt mockup. 
  - Do/don't rules: Not explicitly stated, but the logo is shown applied consistently to merchandise (t-shirt) with no distortion.
- **Color palette**: 
  - Meerkat colors: Vibrant, multicolored palette (orange, yellow, green, blue, purple) – no specific HEX/RGB values provided. 
  - Background: Light gray (left panel) and white (t-shirt).
- **Typography**: 
  - "ai": Sans-serif, light weight, lowercase. 
  - "sa": Sans-serif, bold weight, lowercase. 
  - "lon": Sans-serif, bold weight, lowercase. 
  - "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS": Sans-serif, regular weight, uppercase, smaller size.
- **Imagery / photography**: 
  - T-shirt mockup: Realistic photo of a person wearing a white t-shirt with the logo, holding a coffee cup, and carrying a backpack. Background is blurred (bokeh effect) with warm tones (red/orange). Mood: Casual, everyday, relatable.
- **Iconography**: None visible beyond the meerkat logo.
- **Layout grid**: 
  - Two-column layout: Left column (light gray background) contains the standalone logo; right column (white background) contains the t-shirt mockup. 
  - Margins: Generous white space around the logo in the left column; the t-shirt is centered in the right column.
- **Geometric / decorative elements**: Low-poly meerkat illustration (geometric, triangular facets) – no additional decorative elements.

## Page Layout Summary
The page is split into two equal columns. The left column (light gray background) features the standalone logo centered vertically and horizontally. The right column (white background) displays a t-shirt mockup with the logo applied, centered on the shirt. The layout is clean and balanced, with ample white space to emphasize the logo and merchandise application.

## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page
- No explicit do/don't rules or usage guidelines are printed on the page. The page demonstrates logo application on merchandise (t-shirt) as a best practice example.
